description_long: This kiosk is a compact, rectangular structure with a flat, dark-colored roof and prominent side panels that extend outward, possibly serving as awnings or display areas. The front and rear feature a central counter or service window, flanked by solid panels with a mix of red, white, and black geometric patterns, giving it a modern and eye-catching appearance. The side panels are slightly angled, creating a sense of openness and inviting interaction from the front. The roof appears to be made of metal or a similar hard material, providing sturdy shelter for the kiosk's interior. The overall design is functional and visually striking, suitable for use as a street-side vendor or information booth in an urban environment. There are no visible doors or windows, and the structure is likely intended for service through the front counter.
description: A compact, modern kiosk with a flat dark roof, bold geometric side panels, and a central service counter. The design is visually striking and functional for urban street use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the central counter and bold patterned panels, with the flat roof visible above.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the outward-angled panels and the depth of the roof, with the counter partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the back panel and the geometric design, with less emphasis on the counter.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again shows the angled panels and the structure's width, with the roof and side details prominent.
attribute_signage_type: printed sign integrated into front and side panels with geometric patterns; no visible text
attribute_roof_design: flat roof, dark-colored, likely metal, with slight overhang on all sides
attribute_architectural_style: modern with geometric and minimalist influences
